findings.evidence: `code/TauCeti/Algebra/GroupAction/OrbitRelQuotient.lean:35` already sets the generic context `{G X} [Group G] [MulAction G X]`; `code/TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/UniversalCover/Deck/SubgroupFiberOrbit.lean:60` defines `SubgroupFiberOrbitQuotient H b := MulAction.orbitRel.Quotient H (p ⁻¹' {b})`; the PR proofs at lines 46-63 use only normalizer conjugation and `mul_smul`, not covering/deck-specific topology.
findings.fix: First add the generic normalizer action/quotient action in `TauCeti.MulAction` over `MulAction.orbitRel.Quotient H X`, then make the deck-fibre declarations thin aliases or specialization lemmas using `SubgroupFiberOrbitQuotient` and `subgroupFiberOrbitClass`.
findings.issue: `normalizerSubgroupFiberOrbitMap`, `normalizerSubgroupFiberOrbitEquiv`, `normalizerSubgroupFiberOrbitPermHom`, and the descended `normalizerQuotientSubgroupFiberOrbitPermHom` specialize a generic fact about `[Group G] [MulAction G X]`, `H : Subgroup G`, and `MulAction.orbitRel.Quotient H X` to `Deck p` and `p ⁻¹' {b}`.

summary: The PR adds the right construction, but at the wrong level: the normalizer action on an orbit quotient is generic group-action API and should not be proved only for deck fibres.
